---
title: "Welcome to My Analytics Lab"
sidebar: false 
---

Hello! My name is Muhammed Enes Buyukertas.

This is my personal webpage.

Please stay tuned to follow my works on data analytics, blog posts, and more.

This is our template.

```{r}
library(dslabs)
# The dataset
data("polls_us_election_2016")

# Personal Info
my_first <- "Muhammed Enes"
my_birth_year <- 2003

# Defining k
k <- (nchar(my_first) + my_birth_year) %% 15 + 8
k

# k rows from the data
if (k %% 2 == 0) {
  head(polls_us_election_2016, k)
} else {
  tail(polls_us_election_2016)
}

# Total number of NA values
total_na_original <- sum(is.na(polls_us_election_2016))
total_na_original

# Number of NA values sorted largest to smallest
na_per_column <- sort(colSums(is.na(polls_us_election_2016)), decreasing = TRUE)
head(na_per_column, 8)

# New object without overwriting
new_data <- polls_us_election_2016

# Replacing NA values
for (col in names(new_data)) {
  if (is.numeric(new_data[[col]])) {
    new_data[[col]][is.na(new_data[[col]])] <- my_birth_year + k
  } else if (is.character(new_data[[col]]) || is.factor(new_data[[col]])) {
    if (is.factor(new_data[[col]])) {
      new_data[[col]] <- as.character(new_data[[col]])
    }
    new_data[[col]][is.na(new_data[[col]])] <- paste0(my_first, "_", k)
  }
}

# Display k rows of new data frame
if ( k %% 2 == 0) {
  head(new_data, k)
} else {
  tail(new_data, k)
}

# Total number of NA values remaining in the new data frame
total_na_new <- sum(is.na(new_data))
total_na_new

# Check whether there are still any NA values
anyNA(new_data)
```
